steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says researcher Renee Weber “continues to use Apollo's data,” demonstrating the missions' value to science is ______. The word “continues” signals that the value persists into the present — the blank must express that the value has not ended.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'displaced': means replaced or pushed aside. This contradicts Weber's active, ongoing use of the data. ✗
  • Choice B — 'ongoing': means continuing into the present. Weber's continued use directly demonstrates that the value persists. ✓
  • Choice C — 'original': means existing from the beginning. The passage is making a point about current relevance, not about when the value first existed. ✗
  • Choice D — 'controversial': means disputed. Nothing in the passage suggests any dispute about the missions' value. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
